Elements.Text: ● It defines, for each object, o, a list, L, called o's access control list, which enumerates all the subjects that have access rights for o and, for each such subject, s, gives the access rights that s has for object o

graph TD     A[/etc/passwd]     A --> BB[root: r,w]     A --> BC[mike: r]     A --> BD[roberto: r]     A --> BE[backup: r]     A --> BF[root: r,w,x]     A --> BG[mike: r,x]     A --> BH[roberto: r,x]     A --> BI[backup: r,x]          D --> DA[root: r,w,x]     D --> DB[roberto: r,w,x]     D --> DC[backup: r,x]          E --> EA[root: r,w,x]     E --> EB[backup: r,x]
